___COMMENT___: REFERENCE template for TigerGraph 4.1.4 non-interactive install (sudo ./install.sh -n).
Field names can vary slightly by build — if `-n` rejects this, use the INTERACTIVE installer
(sudo ./install.sh) which asks the same questions. See infra/INSTALL.md.
Replace the INTERNAL IPs with the ones printed by setup-gcp.sh.
ReplicationFactor=2 (minimum for HA) with 3 nodes: data replicates to 2 of the 3 nodes.
